stat.label: Families housed through our home loan programs.

info.heading: Making Homeownership Simple & Affordable
info.paragraph: At Pingal Capital, we offer home loans designed to make your dream of owning a home a reality. With competitive interest rates, flexible repayment tenures, and minimal documentation, we ensure the journey to your new home is smooth and stress-free.

features.title: Zero Hidden Charges
features.description: Complete transparency in processing fees, interest rates and repayment terms with no surprises.

features.title: Quick Disbursement
features.description: Fast-track loan approval and disbursement directly to your account within 7-10 working days.

items.question: What is the minimum CIBIL score required for loan approval?
items.answer: Most lenders consider applications with a CIBIL score of 700 or above. However, the best interest rates are offered to applicants with 800+ CIBIL, subject to profile and lender policies.

items.question: What is the maximum loan amount I can avail?
items.answer: Loan amounts typically range from ₹10 lakhs to ₹10 crores, depending on the property value, your repayment capacity, and lender terms.

items.question: Do you charge any extra fees for loan processing?
items.answer: No. Pingal Capital does not charge any additional service or consultancy fees. You only pay the standard processing fees charged by the bank or NBFC.

items.question: Can you help me get a better interest rate than my bank offers directly?
items.answer: Yes. We compare multiple banks and NBFCs to hunt the best ROI based on your profile, credit score, and requirement—often securing better terms than direct bank visits.

items.question: Can I transfer my existing home loan to a lower interest rate?
items.answer: Yes. We assist with home loan balance transfers, helping reduce EMIs and overall interest costs.
